title: lissochilus ecalcaratus
intro: Lissochilus ecalcaratus, also known as the yellow water lily, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Hydrocharitaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lissochilus ecalcaratus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. Lissochilus ecalcaratus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
